name: Fleet Technician Offboarding Sequence
description: Complete fleet management offboarding sequence for departing technicians

steps.title: Vehicle Return Coordination
steps.description: Coordinate return of assigned fleet vehicles

substeps.title: Schedule vehicle return
substeps.description: Arrange for return of all assigned fleet vehicles

substeps.title: Conduct final vehicle inspection
substeps.description: Perform comprehensive inspection of returned vehicles

substeps.title: Document vehicle condition
substeps.description: Document current condition and any damage or maintenance needs

substeps.title: Transfer vehicle keys and documents
substeps.description: Collect all vehicle keys, registration, and related documents

substeps.title: Update vehicle assignment system
substeps.description: Remove technician assignments from fleet management system

substeps.title: Deactivate vehicle access systems
substeps.description: Deactivate any electronic access systems or tracking devices

substeps.title: Update insurance and liability records
substeps.description: Update insurance records to reflect change in vehicle assignment

substeps.title: Generate vehicle return report
substeps.description: Create comprehensive report of all returned fleet assets
